---
title: "Evaluation Overview"
---

Model evaluation validates trained policies before edge deployment. The toolchain supports
software-in-the-loop (SIL) evaluation in simulation and hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) testing
on physical robots.

![Evaluation validates robot behavior in simulated and real environments before deployment.
*Image: [Robot testing](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Baxter_robot.jpg)
by Humanrobo, [CC BY-SA 3.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/)*
](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/4f/Baxter_robot.jpg/567px-Baxter_robot.jpg){fig-alt="Baxter research robot in a lab environment" width="60%"}

## Evaluation Pipeline

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-eval-pipeline
%%| fig-cap: "Model Evaluation Pipeline"
flowchart LR
    MODEL[Trained Model] --> SIL[SIL Evaluation]
    MODEL --> HIL[HIL Evaluation]

    SIL --> METRICS[Metrics Dashboard]
    HIL --> METRICS

    METRICS --> GATE{Pass?}
    GATE -->|Yes| DEPLOY[Deploy to Fleet]
    GATE -->|No| RETRAIN[Retrain]
```

## Evaluation Metrics

```{python}
#| eval: false
#| code-fold: false
# Standard evaluation metrics for manipulation tasks
metrics = {
    "success_rate": "Percentage of episodes completing the task",
    "grasp_accuracy": "Percentage of successful object grasps",
    "cycle_time": "Average time to complete one task cycle (seconds)",
    "path_efficiency": "Ratio of actual vs optimal path length",
    "collision_rate": "Number of unplanned collisions per episode",
}

for name, desc in metrics.items():
    print(f"  {name}: {desc}")
```

## Running SIL Evaluation

```{bash}
#| eval: false
#| code-fold: false
# Submit evaluation job to Azure ML
az ml job create \
  --file workflows/azureml/sil-evaluation.yml \
  --set inputs.model_path="azureml://models/pick-place-ppo/versions/latest" \
  --set environment_variables.NUM_EVAL_EPISODES=100
```

{{< include ../../../../docs/evaluation/README.md >}}
